programmes.show_description: True Conviction: Charting the final days approaching the scheduled execution of Ivan Cantu. Convicted in 2001 for a double murder in Dallas, he has protested his innocence for over 20 years.
Allied soldiers take off by sea and air, under cover of darkness, and the biggest amphibious invasion in history begins.
Programmes start at 19:00.
Vivienne bears the brunt of a vicious storm. Drew struggles to face reality. Desi breaks the rules for family.
Eden's confused, trying to understand why Remi's decided to move out even though he has a head injury.
From the Famine to the Future: Examing how two million Irish people emigrated in the immediate aftermath of the Famine.
Hugh Cahill is joined by Bernard Jackman, Darren Cave and Donal Lenihan for a look back at the weekend's Six Nations action.
Freddy's Birthday: Frasier discovers that Freddy has been seeing Lilith behind his back, which sets up a battle between the two exes for their grown son's affection.

programmes.show_name: Devil in Disguise: John Wayne Gacy
programmes.show_description: David: Kunkle and Sam are knee-deep in trial; Tovar drives Gacy; Gacy's past grooming of Cram is revealed.
Singer, actress and former X-Factor contestant Mary Byrne (65) from Ballyfermot is ready to face her fear and find love again after ten years of single life.
In 1990s Ireland, Oscar, a young boy, finds himself navigating the true essence of adventure and chaos with his father High, one weekend away at a time.
Mia stifles her jealousy while meeting Ella, the girl now sleeping in her childhood bedroom. Later, she attempts use a glamorous party to land a modelling job
Robyn joins a client on an international flight when it is revealed that the police have found incriminating content on his laptop.
Programmes start at 19:00.
Drew and Harper's fighting breaks Marley. Viv struggles to let go of the past.
Cash feels the pressure from both sides, worrying that he's doing harm by lying to Eden, but knowing he made a promise to Remi to keep the tumour a secret.
Lizzie Fraher and Damion Burrows compete to remodel a seaside home in Devon, with different solutions to some of the challenges facing Lou and Steve and their two deaf children.
In Porthcawl, on the south-west coast of Wales, the crew receive a call about a swimmer who's been swept out to sea in a rip current - as his wife and son watch on helplessly.
JJ Hough's Singing Pub, Banagher: Anna Clifford is joined by musician and TikTok sensation Garron Noone for a trip to JJ Hough's Singing Pub in Offaly, on the banks of the River Shannon.
Marie Antoinette has been queen for a decade and is pregnant with another child, but thieves and traitors stalk Versailles.
Still rattled from the bus crash, Eliza second guesses her diagnosis and decision-making when a local grazier is found collapsed on his property.
